title: Bridge Essay: Tracking the neurodynamics of insight: A meta-analysis of neuroimaging studies.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Non-fabrication** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Non-fabrication — spontaneous thought, mind-wandering, DMN, creative insight.

**Tracking the neurodynamics of insight: Ameta-analysis of neuroimaging studies.**. Biol Psychol.. PMID: 30165082. DOI: 10.1016/j.biopsycho.2018.08.018. The nature of insight has been the interdisciplinary focus of scientific inquiry for over 100 years. Behavioral studies and biographical data suggest that insight, as aform of creative cognition, consists of at least four separate but intercorrelated stages as described by Wallas. Yet no quantitative evidence was available for insight- or insight-stage-specific brain mechanisms that generalize across various insight tasks.
